feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,711Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 0

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: Operation: Cruthor
entry.summary:
Author: iloveducks11

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,750Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Bruce Wayne is a hot, rich asshole, and Clark Kent is a shy, surprisingly built reporter. Batman and Superman have a professional working relationship. That's all there has been and ever will be to it. Right? Then, Lex Luthor breaks the Scarecrow out of Arkham, and things get just a bit more complicated.

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,881Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 233

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day sorta :/

entry.summary:

entry.title: Terraforming
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,366Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Batman’s eternal hubris has brought potential disaster upon Gotham. He and everyone he loves is on the verge of death, and uncovering how they got there is the only way the League can save them. During this process, Superman realizes something that’s been in front of him this whole time.

entry.title: I knew it was real
entry.summary:
Author: Hasen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: He didn't remember consciously making the decision to bite Kal. One moment he was all instinct, ready to shift in order to protect his mate and then he could taste Clark's blood. It was bitter on his tongue, the taste was probably due to the kryptonite entering his bloodstream. It didn't matter; his venom would eliminate all traces. After a few moments, the other stopped struggling; his venom was taking effect. Bruce barely had a few minutes of peace before his worst nightmare unfolded. Kal’s body shuddered and convulsed, a scream ripped his throat. The bite on his neck, which should have been healed by now, began to ooze. His veins began to bulge with a greenish color, and his hands tried to scratch the wound on his neck. This wasn’t the normal reaction expected from a mate. — When Clark is injured after a battle, Bruce gives him the Mating Bite in a desperate attempt to save his life. For shapeshifter mates, the bite's venom helps them heal; however, Clark's Kryptonian body seems to be allergic.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Bat Princess and Cybertronian Bumblebee
entry.summary:
Author: NatalyaAglaevnaNaryshkina

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,441Chapters: 75/75Kudos: 8

Summary: [Transformers + DC, Crossover, Pairing: Bumblebee, Human/Transformer, Minor All Characters/OC, Heavy Headcanons]As the only daughter of a certain Dark Knight, the little princess of Gotham, Nova could get almost anything she wanted with ease. Money? Is there any entity richer than Wayne Enterprises? Strength? Come on, her father is Batman! For Miss Nova, there was no problem that money couldn't solve. If there was, it just meant she hadn't spent enough money—and she had more than enough of that. That was, until she bought a pair of broken glasses to help a classmate with his car-buying plan. Everything changed completely after that.Bumblebee's mission was to protect the holder of the glasses until his leader arrived on Earth. While he was waiting in the used car lot to be bought by Sam, that human girl named Nova smiled at him. From that moment on, that smile became a mark he could never erase from his processor.Nova had once asked him: "Bumblebee, do you like me?" Bumblebee did not answer, only feeling his spark beating abnormally fast. By the time he finally understood his own feelings, it was already too late. "I once had a star. Before she went out."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: congratulations, you adopted a spider!
entry.summary:
Author: maraudersmqry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 162,497Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 4,117

Summary: Peter was meant to be forgotten, he didn’t think that meant being dropped in Gotham. Or in his eight-year-old body, in the least. Or with vigilantes trying to adopt him!   IN WHICH, Dr. Strange gave Peter one last chance at a life, instead of being emo around the faces who no longer recognized him.

entry.title: Symmetry
entry.summary:
Author: osgiliaths

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,050Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: “Look at you,” murmurs Bruce. “Black hair, blue eyes. So obsessed with doing the right thing, one could call it clinically insane.” He gestures to himself, makes a mirror out of them both. “Two different planets, yet I feel like you could have been me in another life. Funny, right? I could’ve been you.”

entry.title: for the views
entry.summary:
Author: littlechinesedoll

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 860Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 241

Summary: Jason, exhausted and ready for the weekend, is on his way back to the dormitories from practice, freshly showered and wet-haired, when someone stops him in the middle of the campus garden grounds, and shoves a microphone and camera in his face. “Call your mom and tell her you love her,” He doesn't have a mom, but he does have a dad... two actually.

entry.title: Reporters Way
entry.summary:
Author: CowgirlJ23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,827Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 11

Summary: A year after the leaked video of Superman's parents, all he wants to do is keep anything negative relating to Superman out of the press. But what about Clark Kent? After being invited to cover a charity gala for Bruce Wayne, his entanglement with him grows more and more each day. But the more that he learns about Bruce, the more that he feels that this is something hidden behind the mask of the playboy billionaire that he puts on, and Clark is determined to find out what it is. And as reported, Clark Kents always gets his way.

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,858Chapters: 13/16Kudos: 229

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.
